items.author: NYT Business
items.text: British Politics Is Obsessing Over the Bond Market. Here’s Why.
items.summary: Britain is facing another round of turmoil in government leadership, jolting debt investors who were already on high alert over inflation.
items.text_it: La politica britannica è ossessionata dal mercato obbligazionario. Ecco perché.
items.summary_it: La Gran Bretagna sta affrontando un altro round di turbolenze nella leadership del governo, scuotendo gli investitori del debito che erano già in allerta per l'inflazione.

items.author: NYT Business
items.text: Bluesky Says Kremlin Is Hacking Its Platform to Spread Propaganda
items.summary: The company said it was fighting Russian efforts to hijack real users’ accounts to post fake content, an apparently novel tactic.
items.text_it: Bluesky dice che il Cremlino sta hackerando la sua piattaforma per diffondere la propaganda
items.summary_it: La società ha detto che stava combattendo gli sforzi russi per dirottare gli account degli utenti reali per pubblicare contenuti falsi, una tattica apparentemente nuova.

items.author: NYT Business
items.text: Trump Approved an Nvidia Chip for Sale in China. Beijing Doesn’t Want It.
items.summary: The U.S. tech giant’s powerful H200 chip seemed poised to boost Beijing’s A.I. ambitions, but not a single one has been purchased in China.
items.text_it: Trump ha approvato un chip Nvidia in vendita in Cina. Pechino non lo vuole.
items.summary_it: Il potente chip H200 del gigante tecnologico statunitense sembrava pronto ad aumentare le ambizioni di INTELLIGENZA artificiale di Pechino, ma nessuno è stato acquistato in Cina.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: As Iran war drags on, this is how quickly global oil stocks are being depleted — and travel season is starting soon
items.summary: Physical supplies of oil through the Strait of Hormuz are 95% below regular levels.
items.text_it: Mentre la guerra in Iran si trascina, questo è quanto velocemente le scorte petrolifere globali si stanno esaurendo — e la stagione dei viaggi sta iniziando presto
items.summary_it: Le forniture fisiche di petrolio attraverso lo Stretto di Hormuz sono inferiori del 95% rispetto ai livelli normali.

items.summary: A record of the April meeting, Jerome H. Powell’s last as chair, underscored the extent to which the war with Iran has upended the economic outlook.

items.author: NYT Business
items.text: Jeff Bezos Praises Trump’s Second Term as ‘More Mature’
items.summary: The Amazon founder and owner of The Washington Post also rejected the idea that he has made changes at his companies to gain favor with the president.

items.author: Financial Times
items.text: Oil drops nearly 6% as two China-bound supertankers cross Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Brent crude falls to about $105 a barrel as Asia-bound vessels raise hopes of resumption of energy flows
items.text_it: Il petrolio scende di quasi il 6% quando due superpetroliere dirette in Cina attraversano lo Stretto di Hormuz
items.summary_it: Il greggio Brent scende a circa $105 al barile mentre le navi dirette in Asia aumentano le speranze di ripresa dei flussi di energia

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Fed interest-rate rate hike chances grow, minutes from Powell’s last meeting suggest
items.summary: Fed officials see a growing risk that inflation could stay higher for longer.
items.text_it: Le possibilità di rialzo dei tassi di interesse della Fed crescono, a pochi minuti dall'ultimo incontro di Powell suggeriscono
items.summary_it: I funzionari della Fed vedono un crescente rischio che l'inflazione possa rimanere più a lungo.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Oil prices post biggest drop in 2 weeks, airline stocks surge on hopes the U.S.-Iran war will soon end
items.summary: Oil futures marked their biggest one-day decline in two weeks Wednesday after President Donald Trump suggested that a deal with Iran was close, raising hopes for a resolution to the months-long stalemate in the Middle East.
items.text_it: I prezzi del petrolio registrano il più grande calo in 2 settimane, le azioni delle compagnie aeree aumentano nella speranza che la guerra USA-Iran finisca presto
items.summary_it: I futures sul petrolio hanno segnato il loro più grande calo di un giorno in due settimane mercoledì dopo che il presidente Donald Trump ha suggerito che un accordo con l'Iran era vicino, aumentando le speranze di una soluzione allo stallo di mesi in Medio Oriente.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: OpenAI could steal SpaceX IPO’s thunder, with Sam Altman filing as soon as Friday
items.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, fresh off a legal victory against Elon Musk, is reportedly gearing his company up for an initial public offering.
items.text_it: OpenAI potrebbe rubare il tuono dell'IPO di SpaceX, con il deposito di Sam Altman non appena venerdì
items.summary_it: Secondo quanto riferito, il CEO di OpenAI Sam Altman, fresco di una vittoria legale contro Elon Musk, sta preparando la sua azienda per un'offerta pubblica iniziale.

items.text: Dow jumps 500 points as oil and bond yields retreat: Live updates - CNBC
items.summary: Dow jumps 500 points as oil and bond yields retreat: Live updates    CNBC

items.author: NYT Business
items.text: Majority of Fed Officials Embraced Possibility of Higher Rates at Latest Meeting
items.summary: A record of the April meeting, Jerome H. Powell’s last as chair, underscored the extent to which the war with Iran has upended the economic outlook.
items.text_it: La maggior parte dei funzionari della Fed ha abbracciato la possibilità di tassi più elevati all'ultima riunione
items.summary_it: Un resoconto dell'incontro di aprile, l'ultimo di Jerome H. Powell come presidente, ha sottolineato la misura in cui la guerra con l'Iran ha sconvolto le prospettive economiche.

items.author: NYT Business
items.text: Jeff Bezos Praises Trump’s Second Term as ‘More Mature’
items.summary: The Amazon founder and owner of The Washington Post also rejected the idea that he has made changes at his companies to gain favor with the president.

items.author: Financial Times
items.text: Oil drops 6% as three supertankers attempt Strait of Hormuz crossing
items.summary: Brent crude falls below $105 a barrel as vessels bound for Asia raise hopes of resumption of energy flows

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Fed minutes show increased chances of interest-rate hike
items.summary: Fed officials see a growing risk that inflation would stay higher for longer.
items.text_it: I minuti della Fed mostrano maggiori possibilità di aumento dei tassi di interesse
items.summary_it: I funzionari della Fed vedono un rischio crescente che l'inflazione rimanga più alta più a lungo.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Artificial intelligence was supposed to reduce prices. Instead AI is boosting inflation.
items.summary: The upsurge in U.S. inflation, reaching a three-year high, has been fueled by rising oil prices and the residual effects of the Trump tariffs. But another thing is adding to the problem: the boom in artificial intelligence.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: GameStop ups its stake in eBay after its buyout bid was rejected
items.summary: eBay may have shot down GameStop’s $56 billion buyout offer this month, but the videogame retailer continues to show interest in the online auction platform.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Global oil prices drop below $105 a barrel, airline stocks surge on hopes the U.S.-Iran war will soon end
items.summary: Oil futures were extending their declines on Wednesday after President Donald Trump suggested that a deal with Iran was close, raising hopes for a resolution to the months-long stalemate in the Middle East.
